topic: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood

script.title: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood 🌊 | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, God looked at the world and saw that people had forgotten how to be kind. But there was one man named Noah who loved God with his whole heart.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a kind elderly man with a white beard, Noah, kneeling in prayer in a sunny green field with animals nearby, bright warm colors, cheerful biblical art style

scenes.narration: God spoke to Noah and said, 'I want you to build a very big boat called an ark. Make it huge — big enough for your family and two of every animal!'
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful storybook illustration of God speaking to Noah with golden light, Noah looking up with a smile, holding wooden tools, bright blue sky, colorful biblical children's book style

scenes.narration: Noah and his sons worked hard every single day, cutting wood and building the enormous ark. The neighbors thought it was funny — there was no water for miles!
scenes.image_prompt: Bright storybook illustration of Noah and his three sons happily sawing and hammering a giant wooden ark on dry land, sunny day, cheerful and colorful children's Bible art style

scenes.narration: Then the animals came — two by two! Elephants and giraffes, lions and lambs, tiny bugs and big bears. God sent them all marching to the ark!
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful storybook illustration of pairs of colorful animals — elephants, giraffes, lions, birds, penguins — marching in a happy line toward a giant wooden ark, bright and cheerful children's Bible style

scenes.narration: When everyone was safe inside, the rain began to fall. It rained for forty days and forty nights, and water covered the whole earth!
scenes.image_prompt: Storybook illustration of the wooden ark floating on stormy blue water under dramatic rain clouds, lightning in the distance but the ark looks safe and cozy, colorful children's biblical art

scenes.narration: Inside the ark, Noah's family cared for all the animals. God kept them safe through every stormy wave. Noah trusted God — and God never forgot them!
scenes.image_prompt: Warm cozy storybook illustration inside the ark with Noah's family feeding happy animals — sheep, birds, elephants — lantern light glowing, cheerful and safe feeling, bright children's Bible art style

scenes.narration: Finally the rain stopped! Noah sent a dove out to look for land. The dove came back with an olive branch — a sign that dry ground had appeared!
scenes.image_prompt: Beautiful storybook illustration of a white dove flying back to the ark's window holding a green olive branch, sunlight breaking through clouds, bright hopeful colors, cheerful children's biblical art

scenes.narration: God placed a beautiful rainbow in the sky — His promise to always love and care for the world. Noah and his family praised God with thankful hearts!
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful storybook illustration of Noah's whole family and the animals standing outside the ark under a giant colorful rainbow in a sunny sky, everyone smiling and praising God, bright cheerful children's Bible art
